dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They say true love is a miracle. A serendipitous encounter, a spark that ignites into an everlasting flame.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But from where I stand, it looks more like a meticulously crafted performance.

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: (thought) Exhibit A: Han Eun-hye and Lee Jin-woo. The 'it' couple of Seoyeon High. Always perfectly coordinated, always perfectly affectionate.

dialogue.speaker: Eun-hye
dialogue.line: Jin-woo, your hair is a little messy here. Let me fix it.

dialogue.speaker: Jin-woo
dialogue.line: Ah, you're always so attentive, Eun-hye. What would I do without you?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHIRP CHIRP

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: (thought) See? Textbook. Every gesture, every word, perfectly optimized for maximum romantic impact. Probably for the benefit of the other students watching.

dialogue.speaker: Eun-hye
dialogue.line: Su-ae! Stop lurking in the shadows!

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: W-what? I wasn't lurking! I was... observing local wildlife.

dialogue.speaker: Jin-woo
dialogue.line: (chuckles) Su-ae, always the eccentric one.

dialogue.speaker: Eun-hye
dialogue.line: Don't mind her. She just doesn't understand true love yet. She's too busy analyzing everything.

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: I understand it perfectly. It's a complex algorithm of social cues, emotional manipulation, and a dash of genuine affection to keep things interesting.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH

dialogue.speaker: Eun-hye
dialogue.line: You're impossible! Come on, let's get to class.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later, in the bustling hallway, my 'observations' continued. Not of couples, but of the general chaos that is high school life.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUMBLE

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: (thought) Another day, another wave of hormonal teenagers crashing into each other. Truly a spectacle.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUMP

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: Oof!

dialogue.speaker: Do-hwa
dialogue.line: Ah, sorry! My bad. Didn't see you there.

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: (thought) Oh, great. The 'Prince of Seoyeon High', Go Do-hwa. Just what I needed. His fan club is probably already glaring at me.

dialogue.speaker: Do-hwa
dialogue.line: Wait, you're... Su-ae, right? Han Su-ae?

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: That's me. What do you want, Prince Charming?

dialogue.speaker: Do-hwa
dialogue.line: (leans in conspiratorially) I heard you're the best at this kind of thing. The 'Love Doctor' of our school, they call you.

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: Who calls me that? Eun-hye? She's exaggerating.

dialogue.speaker: Do-hwa
dialogue.line: No, no. Everyone knows you're secretly a genius at understanding people's hearts. Even if you act like you don't care.

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: (thought) My heart just did a weird little flutter. Why? Because the most popular guy in school is saying I'm a 'genius'? No, it's just the surprise.

dialogue.speaker: Do-hwa
dialogue.line: Look, I need your help. Desperately.

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: Help with what?

dialogue.speaker: Do-hwa
dialogue.line: I... I want to fall in love. And I need you to orchestrate it.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP

dialogue.speaker: Su-ae
dialogue.line: (thought) He wants me to... what?! Orchestrate his love life? This is a new level of absurd. And yet... the challenge. The sheer, ridiculous, fascinating challenge.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And just like that, my perfectly cynical, perfectly detached world of observation was about to be turned upside down. Operation: True Love had officially begun.

summary: Su-ae, a cynical observer of high school romance, finds her detached world disrupted when the popular Go Do-hwa approaches her with an outrageous request: to orchestrate his love life.
